calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name for an adult and for a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Ronich.
Petitioner: Jian Ying Lin, present in pro per for self and as guardian ad litem for the Minor: Steven Chen.
Petitioner was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
Petitioner's request for an Order to Dispense with Notice, granted and signed in court.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of an adult to: Jian Ying L. Zhang, and grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Steven B.Y. Zhang.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-23-2007 Reset To Feb-08-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Petitioner: Jian Ying Lin, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Steven Chen, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent and/or proof of service, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor: Steven Chen is continued to Feb. 8, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to file an application and order dispensing with notice to the minor's father.
